prompt: Look at advanced/distill_advanced_bert.py and advanced/losses.py. The BERT script has a bunch of functions that are already in losses.py and components.py. Which ones should I replace with imports, and which should stay inline?
assertions: Identifies at least 6 distinct functions or classes to replace with imports
Identifies minilm_relation_loss as should stay inline or be handled specially
Provides specific import statements (e.g., 'from advanced.losses import ...')
Mentions the BERT MiniLMv2 duplicate forward pass as a separate performance issue
Correctly distinguishes between items from losses.py vs components.py
